finding.title: Best Manager
finding.exec_summary: The best manager is **Cara Losch** (East region) with the following KPI evidence: win_rate = 0.6442953020, closed_deals = 745, won_deals = 480, won_revenue = 1,130,049.0, avg_cycle_days_closed = 49.0402684564.
risks: Possible data latency in closed_deals reporting
recommendations: Implement regular performance reviews for East region managers
Integrate real-time KPI dashboards for timely insights
